description: Azure FrontDoor CDN resources now use Azure.Provisioning's built-in name generation algorithm instead of Aspire's custom logic, removing the manual name length cap. Upgrading from 13.3 may produce duplicate endpoint, origin group, or route names — remove and re-add the affected resource, or set the Name explicitly via ConfigureInfrastructure, to avoid conflicts.
name: Azure FrontDoor CDN uses Azure.Provisioning name generation
